name: Last Train Home
description:
Bystander Pov

It's time to head home after a long day, catching the last train ride and finding a nice cozy spot to sleep before you arrive at your destination. However upon waking up, you encounter an ugly bastard bothering a female student who just wants to get home after a long day of working at her part time job.

The scenario is open for anything, you can be a fellow classmate of hers or maybe even a teacher or even Satan himself.

Artist/Source:

All characters are 18+ in the bot.

And yes the title is a Jojo's reference.
creator: NTRLarp
